content:
Total compensation: $16,000–$20,000 once funding arrives.

Timeline:

- Months 1–4: Work together exploratively (no payment; this is investment in foundation-building)
- Month 4–5: Submit grant applications
- Month 5–8: Complete prototype phase while awaiting funding decisions
- October 2025 onwards: As grants award, compensation distributes (quarterly or upon milestone, your preference)

-----

WHY I’M ASKING WITHOUT COMPENSATION RIGHT NOW

I’m in bootstrap mode. Zero budget at this moment. But this work—the dramaturgical framework you help articulate—becomes the foundation for everything downstream. When I land funding (and the programs listed above total $100K+ in realistic potential), you’re retroactively compensated and credited as narrative co-architect.

More importantly: You’d be shaping a methodology from genesis. Most collaborators come in after the framework is fixed. You’d be helping build the framework. That’s a different kind of value—it’s intellectual ownership and precedent-setting.
